title: Croc: Legend of the Gobbos Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Argonaut's mascot platformer follows Croc through Gobbo villages with tail-spin attacks, gummi savers, and collect-a-thon structure across whimsical themed islands.
narrative.core_loop: Tail-spin through stages, rescue Gobbos, collect crystals and jigsaw pieces, and defeat Baron Dante to save the island.

mechanics.map_notes: 360-degree tail spin destroys enemies and breaks crates.
mechanics.expression: 360-degree tail spin destroys enemies and breaks crates.

mechanics.map_notes: Gobbos, crystals, and jigsaw pieces drive completion goals.
mechanics.expression: Gobbos, crystals, and jigsaw pieces drive completion goals.

mechanics.map_notes: Stages are forward gauntlets ending at crystal doors.
mechanics.expression: Stages are forward gauntlets ending at crystal doors.

mechanics.map_notes: Gummi savers and lives gate retries.
mechanics.expression: Gummi savers and lives gate retries.

mechanics.map_notes: Lava, ice, and stomp pads test jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Lava, ice, and stomp pads test jump timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Gummi saver checkpoints respawn Croc after death.
mechanics.expression: Gummi saver checkpoints respawn Croc after death.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss defeats unlock subsequent island areas.
mechanics.expression: Boss defeats unlock subsequent island areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Baron Dante minions follow learnable stomp cycles.
mechanics.expression: Baron Dante minions follow learnable stomp cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden caves and bonus Gobbos extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Hidden caves and bonus Gobbos extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Stomp attacks require exact positioning on enemies.
mechanics.expression: Stomp attacks require exact positioning on enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: One hit costs a life unless invincibility pickup active.
mechanics.expression: One hit costs a life unless invincibility pickup active.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Croc: Legend of the Gobbos through its core platformer loop.
